analytics._note: PostHog, baked into the template so every customer site ships with analytics. One shared AlignCompass project; the slug is registered as a super-property so events filter per customer. Cookieless (memory persistence) so no consent banner is required. The apiKey is the PUBLIC project key — safe to embed. The build leaves this as-is.

seo.title: Never Miss Another Job Call | AlignCompass
seo.description: Local service pros lose ~$1,000/week to missed calls. AlignCompass texts back every missed call and re-books past customers — free website, pay when it works.
seo.h1: Stop losing jobs to the calls you can't answer.
keywords: missed call text back for contractors
lead capture for home service businesses

sections.headline: Stop losing jobs to the calls you can't answer.
sections.subhead: We set up a system that texts back every missed call in seconds and wins back the customers you already earned — so you fill your schedule without renting another ad. Your website's free. You only pay when it pays for itself.

image.alt: HVAC owner working under a unit while a new booking notification lights up the phone in their hand

sections.heading: Every missed call is a job walking out the door.
items: Miss 10 calls a week and that's roughly $1,000 a week gone — straight to the competitor who picked up.
85% of people who hit your voicemail never call back. They just call the next guy on the list.
Meanwhile, the customers you already served are being re-won by whoever markets to them first — while you're heads-down on a job.

items.title: …and we grow with you

sections.heading: You do the work. We catch the business it creates.
sections.empathy: You can't answer the phone with your arm in a furnace. And you've been burned before — sold "4,000 impressions" by an agency that vanished. You don't need more noise. You need the jobs you're already earning to actually land.

sections.heading: Three steps to a schedule that fills itself.

steps.title: We build your site and switch on call recovery
steps.body: A free, fast website that gets you found — and every missed call gets an instant text back.

steps.title: We wake up your past customers
steps.body: Timed "you're due" resells and "call me first when it breaks," sent to the customers you already earned.

steps.title: The jobs land in your own system
steps.body: You see exactly what we recovered, right in the tools you already use. Point at a job and say, "that one came from the system."

sections.heading: Why missed calls and forgotten customers cost you more than any ad ever will

items.title: The demand is already yours — you're just leaking it
items.body: Most local service businesses miss somewhere between a fifth and a third of their inbound calls — and solo operators miss far more, because you're on the job, not by the phone. Of the people who reach voicemail, about 85% never call back. That's not a marketing problem you fix by buying more leads; it's a capture problem. On top of that, roughly 43% of a typical customer list has gone quiet — 18+ months with no booking — even though re-booking a past customer converts at 60–70%, versus 5–20% for a cold lead. And since the Google Map Pack drives over half of local-service search traffic, being easy to find and instant to answer is where the booked jobs actually come from. AlignCompass plugs both leaks: missed-call text-back so no caller slips away, and past-customer reactivation so your own list goes back to work — measured in real booked jobs, not impressions.

sections.heading: The two questions every owner asks

items.q: "I already get enough leads through Google and Jobber — why pay extra?"
items.a: You're not buying more leads. You're keeping the ones you already paid for. Most owners are quietly losing a fifth to a third of their calls and letting their past customers go cold. This captures that — and you see it as booked jobs, not a vague promise.
Only if it makes you money. The website's free, and you don't pay for the engine until it books enough to cover itself — about 60 days. If it doesn't pay for itself, you don't pay.

sections.heading: Simple pricing. You don't pay until it works.
includes: Free SEO website + Google Business Profile — yours to keep
Booked-job attribution in your own system
We do all the setup — including pulling your customer list for you
Founding clients pay near cost for the first few slots in exchange for a testimonial

sections.heading: Want to see what you're leaving on the table?
sections.body: Book a free 15-minute setup call, or get a free missed-revenue audit that shows — in your own numbers — what unanswered calls and a cold customer list are costing you.

seo.title: Lead Capture & Reactivation Services | AlignCompass
seo.description: What AlignCompass does for local service businesses: get found on Google, text back every missed call, and re-book past customers — measured in booked jobs.
seo.h1: Everything we do points at one thing: more booked jobs.

sections.headline: Everything we do points at one thing: more booked jobs.
sections.subhead: We get you found, make sure you never lose a lead, and keep your customers coming back. The engine is the core — and as you grow, we build whatever wins you more work.

image.alt: A service business calendar filling up with booked jobs over the week

items.title: Get found
items.body: The problem: you're not showing up when neighbors search for what you do. What we do: build you a fast, SEO-strong website and dial in your Google Business Profile. The outcome: you show up first when someone nearby needs you — and the site is free.

items.title: Never lose a lead
items.body: The problem: you're on a job, the phone rings, and the caller is gone before you surface. What we do: every missed call gets a text back in seconds, plus reminders that cut no-shows. The outcome: the job doesn't go to the next guy.

items.title: Win back customers
items.body: The problem: the customers you already served drift to whoever markets to them next. What we do: timed "you're due" and "call me first" campaigns to your existing list. The outcome: old jobs turn into new ones — at far better odds than chasing cold leads.

items.title: The free-site capstone
items.body: We're building you the system anyway — so the website it all lives on is free. It proves we can do the work before you pay a cent.

items.title: More eyes on you
items.body: Content that pulls homeowners in before they even pick up the phone — so you're the name they already trust when something breaks.

items.title: Your best customers, selling for you
items.body: We turn the people who already love your work into your best source of referrals — on autopilot.

sections.heading: …and we grow with you (where we're headed, not promised today)

items.title: Book in two taps
items.body: As you scale, your customers book you straight from their phone — no phone tag, fewer clicks to the sale.

items.title: On their home screen
items.body: Down the road, your business one tap away on your customer's phone — the shortest path from "I need this" to "booked."

items.title: Sell directly
items.body: For the businesses that sell products: sell right from your site, no middleman. (Situational — not core for the trades.)

sections.heading: One price for the whole engine.
includes: Free SEO website + Google Business Profile
Booked-job attribution in your own system
Done-for-you setup, including your customer-list export

sections.heading: Not sure where the leaks are?
sections.body: Start with a free missed-revenue audit — we'll show you, in your own numbers, what's slipping away. Head to the Free Audit page to get yours.

seo.title: Free Missed-Revenue Audit | AlignCompass
seo.description: See what missed calls and a cold customer list are costing you — in your own numbers. Free, no obligation. Get your missed-revenue audit from AlignCompass.
seo.h1: See exactly what you're leaving on the table — for free.
keywords: missed call cost calculator for contractors
how much do missed calls cost

sections.headline: See exactly what you're leaving on the table — for free.
sections.subhead: Most owners have no idea how much a few missed calls a week and a quiet customer list really cost. We'll show you the number — in your own math, not someone else's case study.

image.alt: Simple worksheet showing calls received, calls missed, and dollars lost per week

items.title: Your missed-call math
items.body: Calls in vs. calls missed, turned into a real weekly dollar figure for your business.

items.title: Your dormant-list value
items.body: An estimate of how much repeat work is sitting cold in the customers you already served.

items.title: The recoverable number
items.body: What an always-on system could realistically put back on your calendar — and how fast.

steps.title: Tell us a few numbers
steps.body: Roughly how many calls you get a week, and about how big your past-customer list is. Two minutes.

steps.title: We run the math
steps.body: We turn it into your real missed-revenue figure — no fluff, no vanity metrics.

steps.title: You decide
steps.body: Keep the numbers and do nothing, or book a free setup call to plug the leaks. No pressure.

sections.heading: Get your free missed-revenue audit
sections.body: Send us a few numbers and we'll come back with your figure. No obligation, no sales pressure.

items.a: Yes. No cost, no obligation, no card. You get the numbers whether or not we ever work together.

items.q: Will I get hounded with sales calls?
items.a: No. We send you the figure. If you want to talk, you book a call — on your terms.

items.q: What if my numbers are rough guesses?
items.a: Perfect. Ballpark is enough — the math still shows you the scale of what's slipping away.

sections.headline: We built this for the owner who's sick of paying for impressions.
sections.subhead: You've been pitched before. You got a report full of numbers that didn't matter and a bill that did. AlignCompass is the opposite of that.

image.alt: A focused operator reviewing real booked-job numbers on a laptop

sections.heading: Why this exists
sections.empathy: We've watched good owners do everything right — show up, do great work, earn a real reputation — and still bleed money to a gap in their system. The phone rings while they're under a house. A customer they wowed two years ago forgets the name and calls a competitor. It's not a hustle problem. It's a capture problem. And it's fixable.

seo.title: AlignCompass FAQ | Pricing, Guarantee & How It Works
seo.description: Answers on pricing, the pay-when-it-works guarantee, "I already get enough leads," and how AlignCompass recovers missed calls and re-books past customers.
seo.h1: Questions owners ask before they say yes.

sections.headline: Questions owners ask before they say yes.
sections.subhead: Straight answers on pricing, the guarantee, and exactly how this works — no jargon.

items.q: I already get enough leads through Google and Jobber. Why pay extra?
items.a: You're not buying more leads — you're keeping the ones you already paid for. Most owners quietly lose a fifth to a third of their calls and let past customers go cold. We capture both, and you see it as booked jobs in your own system, not a vague promise.

items.q: Is this just another recurring fee that creeps onto my card?
items.a: Only if it makes you money. The website's free, and you don't pay for the engine until it books enough to cover itself — about 60 days. If it never pays for itself, you don't pay. That's the whole deal.
$297/mo plus a one-time setup of about $500–800. Founding clients pay near cost for the first few slots in exchange for a testimonial.
We build the free site, switch on missed-call recovery, and reactivate your list. If that doesn't book enough to pay for itself in roughly 60 days, you don't start paying until it does.

items.q: What do I actually have to do?
items.a: Almost nothing. We do 100% of the setup — including pulling your customer list for you, which most owners can't export themselves. Your only job is replying "Y" to a one-tap text after a good job.

items.q: How fast will I see results?
items.a: Often within the first week — the first recovered call can land quickly, and a reactivation blast to your existing list is fast cash once we import it. Text-back goes live as soon as carrier approval clears.

We're a newer operation building our first founding-client results right now, so we lead with your own numbers — a free audit that shows what you're losing — rather than someone else's case study. The mechanisms (missed-call text-back and reactivation) are well-proven across the industry, and we back the whole thing with pay-when-it-works.

items.q: Who owns my website and my data?
items.a: You do. The site is yours to keep, and your customer data stays yours — always.

items.q: Do I have to switch the tools I already use?
items.a: No. Results show up in the system you already work in. We fit around how you run your business.

sections.heading: Still have a question?
sections.body: Book a free setup call, or just email us — we answer straight.

flags: NAP incomplete: no phone number and no street address (service-area business, run remotely from Southwest Florida). Email-only NAP is consistent across all pages. Do not invent — supply a phone/booking link before launch.
No first-party proof: the proof/testimonials section is intentionally omitted site-wide. Lawyer testimonial + cousin's HVAC pilot numbers are pending — add a proof section once real.
CTAs are placeholders: primary 'Book your free setup call' -> #book; audit anchor -> #audit. No booking backend yet (Phase-4). Wire to a real booking link/Calendly before launch.
Forms post via mailto:aligncompass@gmail.com (endpoint empty). Add a real form endpoint (Formspree-style) before launch.
Founding-rate scarcity ('first few founding slots') is real but confirm exact slot count/window before publishing.
Base is '/' (apex root site), not a /slug/ subdir — this is the AlignCompass apex marketing site.
